target:
Hey Shinpei!
Did you save Mio!?

Sou…this one…
Ah, no time now.

Mio, let's go to Tiger Island.
Wait here with Sou.

O, hey…
This is bad isn't it…?
That thing…

…
Damn! 
Breaking the hunting rifle hurt…

The remaining weapons are my mountain knife and your pistol,
and Tokiko's Guildenstern!

My prized hammer's broken too…
And I failed to take my Amenonuhoko…

Your body is reaching its limit, isn't it?
Do you have any secret weapon to escape this situation?

(Ryunosuke, can you hear me…?
I'll do it… 
Possess his armor and destroy him from the inside)

(You don't need to worry about my body.
Don't hold back. 
Give it everything… and get into Shide's pocket!!)

You were careless, Shide…
I did touch your body after all!

He cut off part of his own body…
What the hell is going on…!

You tried to possess Ryunosuke-kun 
into my armor didn't you? 
That was dangerous.
So I made him cut off a part of the mud before he could touch it.

Huh? 
He's probably in the mud over there.
…You know, I'm sure that's it.

Oh no… I accidentally stepped on him. 
Sorry about that…
He was just too small after all.

If you had come 30 seconds earlier,
something might have changed…

Nagumo-sensei!! 
Why are you so late!!

(He's still alive…!
If I can defeat Shide, maybe we can save him)

Even your old body…
If you get any closer, it'll be the same fate.
You don't have a rifle anymore right?

Well, well… 
It's different when you have a walkthrough.

It's a death game, or an action game,
but especially in those…

When I fight strong bosses for the first time…
I'm prepared to lose and watch their patterns.

Once I memorize their moves,
I go in for the efficient win.

When you actually beat them… 
That's what makes it feel good, I guess…

Ah… Ah…!
That's right! 
It was…

(I should have realized earlier…
Nagumo-sensei had some kind of trump card…
But…)

Shinpei, loop again.
Find a way to break this situation.

If you need time to think,
we'll give it…
(This loop only took me back about 10 minutes…!)

I heard from my mother.
You don't have much time left.
No more time…? What do you mean…
It's been a while since I've had this much trouble in a game.

But it was worth the effort,
and quite enjoyable…

Though I suppose you could call this a thank-you, 
but to make it less painful…
I'll let you die.

Goodbye, Shinpei-kun.
This is game over here.

(With Mio carrying me,
moving so fast…)

Huh? What's wrong?
You suddenly stopped…

Caught up.
Mio, you're above us now.

Okay… Then let's get ahead of them,
and go out from the manhole!

(Good…!
If this works, I'll be safe…)
Miko sent Mio to the sewers!

You!!
Did you save Mio!?
Why…!?

Ah, she's fine!! 
She won't return as an enemy.

…Anyway both of you,
did you turn off your phones!?

Because Shinpei said…
Turn off your phones… 
In case there's a call from the shadow…

Idiot… 
That phone was used by the shadow.

Sorry, Shinpei…!!
Even though I was with you…

We don't have time.
I'm going to Tiger Island with Mio!

It hurt but I'm fine.
Now that you've copied me and healed the wound, I'm okay. 
It really hurt though.

Don't worry about it.
If I were you, I'd have done the same thing too.

Sou and Mio, go back to Mikko,
and take care of the kids…!!

To the Tiger Island where the teachers are waiting…!!
13. Divided Companions 2
Make sure not to drop me.
(Good, with this speed I can catch up before Mio's group reaches the field…!)

Mio!?
Why did you suddenly stop—

Moreover, it's not just one or two.
They're surrounding us…
(Damn! They came back again after I thought they'd backed off…)
(Flying over the ground was probably too noticeable…?)
By the way, if we just keep going…
…We'll have to fight our way through.

Mio, I'm sorry…
But right now you're my only hope.

Shin-chan.
Then, don't leave my side no matter what.
(When Shin-chan called, I was told to come to my father's field…)

These cucumbers are great. 
Alain is good at growing vegetables too.

I prefer pickled cucumbers,
But since I tried them in kimchi…
I've come to like pickles too.

After all, France…
It's different from the real thing, right?
What did you do to Shinpei?!

(How could it be… 
Shin-chan too, after my sister…)

But Mom hated both of them.
Don't you think that's troublesome?
